title: fix: gate instructions file I/O and commandNotes on fresh sessions only
lessons: Fixed async handling - ensure proper await/promise chain
Added error handling - wrap risky operations in try/catch
Fixed type issue - use strict comparison and explicit type conversion
Added boundary check - validate array/string indices
diff_summary:
t canResumeSession before the I/O block and gate both the disk
    operations and commandNotes construction on !canResumeSession / !sessionId.
    
    Adds three regression tests: commandNotes is populated on fresh sessions,
    empty on resume; and no agent-instructions.md is written on resume.
